Package org.eventb.core.seqprover.rewriterTests

Class PredicateSimplifierTests

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.core.seqprover.rewriterTests.AbstractFormulaRewriterTests
org.eventb.core.seqprover.rewriterTests.PredicateSimplifierTests
Direct Known Subclasses:
AutoFormulaRewriterTests, PredicateSimplifierTests.FullTests, PredicateSimplifierTests.MinimalTests
public abstract class PredicateSimplifierTests extends AbstractFormulaRewriterTests
Unit tests for class PredicateSimplifier.
